title: Viners Barware Pourer Gift Set, 2 Pack
features: CLASSIC BARWARE | Our stylish and modern spirit pourers help you to create great food and perfect cocktails. Each is expertly crafted, making them the perfect gift for entertainers and cocktail lovers on any occasion

MULTI-PURPOSE SPOUTS | These spirit pourers are versatile and suitable for more than just drinks. Use for measuring spirits for cocktail creations or for pouring syrups and oils. The flexible sealing rings fit various bottle neck sizes

HOW TO USE | Once the pourer is pushed into the bottle spout the silicone seal will prevent leaks. Tilt to pour the contents in continuous controlled flow. To clean, only hand wash with warm soapy water and dry immediately

BARWARE RANGE | Entertain, create and serve with flair and quality thanks to the Viners Barware Collection. Our range has all the tools to professionally entertain guests at home, from bottle storage to cocktail shakers, stirrers, and wine buckets

VINERS ELEGANCE | Viners has existed for over 110 years and has become a much-loved British brand and household name, steeped in heritage. We pride ourselves on delivering excellence - elegant, robust barware made from fine quality materials
description: From the manufacturer Clamp Bottle Stopper Waiter's Friend Cocktail Mixing Spoon Double Measure Cocktail Strainer Add To Basket Add To Basket Add To Basket Add To Basket Buying Options Customer Reviews 1.0 out of 5 stars 1 4.5 out of 5 stars 162 5.0 out of 5 stars 2 1.0 out of 5 stars 1 4.0 out of 5 stars 2 Price £9.30 £ 9 . 30 £4.00 £ 4 . 00 £1.93 £ 1 . 93 £9.30 £ 9 . 30 £6.30 £ 6 . 30 Description The Viners lever-arm bottle stoppers are designed to keep wine bottles airtight. A secure way to seal unfinished bottles on most neck sizes. Featuring a handy integrated crown cap bottle opener at the end of the lever arm. The double-lever hinge easily extracts the cork from the bottle in two swift steps. The neat, retractable blade removes foil protection from bottles. It also features a handy, easy to open bottle cap remover. Professionally mix your favourite cocktail with this mixing spoon. Upside down, using the flat end and twisted handle, you can layer spirits to create stacked cocktails and drinks in tall glasses. Our double measure is essential for measuring accurately when making cocktail drinks or serving spirits when entertaining. It features both single 30ml capacity and a double tot 60ml capacity measures, ideal for pouring like a true bartender. Sieve your drinks and keep them smooth with this Hawthorne style cocktail strainer. It filters out ice, garnish and fruit pieces, and the springs expand to fit over different sized glasses or shakers. It has a hanging hole for neat storage.
